source_note: Keeper Rulebook Chapter 8: Sanity, treatment and recovery (p.164-168). Indefinite insanity requires treatment to recover; three treatment paths are modeled here. These mirror the PsychotherapySession implementation in coc_healing.py.

psychoanalysis.source_note: Keeper Rulebook p.164: weekly Psychoanalysis skill roll offers a SAN recovery chance scaled by success level. Private care also resolves a monthly 1D100 treatment roll (01-95 gain 1D3; 96-00 setback lose 1D6).

asylum_confinement.source_note: Keeper Rulebook p.164: an indefinitely insane investigator may be confined to an asylum; monthly treatment rolls use institution quality (good = bonus die, poor = penalty die). Recovery is gradual — never a single full restore.

asylum_release.source_note: Keeper Rulebook p.164-168: at the end of asylum confinement, resolve one monthly treatment roll (quality-tier dice apply). Success gains 1D3 SAN; setback loses 1D6. Does not restore to max SAN.

self_help.source_note: Keeper Rulebook p.164-165: a self-help recovery attempt resolved by a SAN roll, bound to a structured key_connection backstory field. Failure corrupts that backstory entry.
